data.description: BUILDPLAN M4 / WS-14a (BUILDPLAN id MA-15). Decompose the processIssues main loop into named stage functions (each about 40 lines or less) - MA-13 tests stay green; de-cast workflows/tidy-and-debug.ts stages (no detective-any or as-any stage casts; stages typed against handler input/output types). ACs: AC-30, AC-34. Depends: MA-13. Size M.
data.title: Decompose processIssues and de-cast workflow stages

data.body:
REVIEW (own-reviewer protocol, diff vs origin/main after #43 merge forced restack)

Scope: falcon-detective/src/handlers/processIssues.ts, falcon-detective/src/workflows/tidy-and-debug.ts, scripts/debt-gates.sh. No touches to lib/gemini.ts, package.json (MA-19 territory), falcon-agent (G-1), or any test file.

VERDICT: APPROVE — no Critical or Major findings.

Parity audit against the MA-13 oracle (all verified against the old loop):
- exception routes: readContext/classify/applyEdit/verify invoke throws and in-loop revert throws still propagate out of the handler after terminal revert + client close; analyzePoison and first-propose throws still skip the issue with identical console.error text; retry-propose throw still breaks to terminal revert.
- observable call order preserved: verify sees the 0-based attempt counter; Broken does fs_write reverts BEFORE the re-propose invoke; snapshot fs_read is idempotent per path and re-snapshots new paths from re-proposed diffs; exhaustion = 3 in-loop + 1 terminal revert; snapshot client is created only after a successful proposal and closed before commitOne.
- previousFailure key is present-but-undefined on first propose (invokeHandler.test.ts pin).

Minor (accepted, not blocking):
1. AttemptVerdict = PreviousFailure | "Clean" | "GiveUp" mixes object and string-literal union members; documented, type-safe narrowing, keeps applyAndVerify at 33 lines.
2. Retry-failure log derives the file from tagged.value.issue.location.file instead of the loop issue — classify echoes the issue through schema validation, so content-identical.
3. Handle body is 42 lines incl. comments/blanks; the AC-30 budget targets the named stage functions, all <= 37 lines (classifyIssue 15, proposeForIssue 23, prepareProposal 37, snapshotOnce 14, revertSnapshots 5, attemptOnce 28, applyAndVerify 33, commitOrRevert 36).

Gates at review time: tsc --noEmit clean; biome clean (55 files); 136/136 tests green with zero diffs under falcon-detective/tests/; debt-gates.sh 9/9 PASS incl. new no-workflow-any (AC-34); check-planted-defects.sh exit 0.

PR opened: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/58 (head 434ba6d, base main). Note: was planned as stacked on #43, but #43 merged to main mid-build — branch rebased onto origin/main (ee33cb0), so the PR carries only the MA-15 diff. Gates at PR time: tsc clean, biome clean, 136/136 tests green with MA-13 test files unmodified, debt-gates 9/9 PASS incl. new no-workflow-any (AC-34), check-planted-defects exit 0.

Merged (PR #58, merge commit dda70de, operator-authorized batch). processIssues decomposed into 8 named stages all ≤40 lines (AC-30); workflow fully de-cast with new no-workflow-any debt gate (AC-34); MA-13 test oracle unmodified and green.
